evals.prompt: I'm underwriting a single-family in Cleveland Heights — the address is 3456 Quilliams Rd, Cleveland Heights, OH 44121. Can you pull comps for the last 6 months within about a mile radius? I want to see all recently sold properties so I can figure out the ARV.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown table of comparable sold properties near 3456 Quilliams Rd, Cleveland Heights OH 44121, scraped from Redfin, covering approximately the last 180 days. Columns include: Address, Sale Price, Beds, Baths, Sqft, $/Sqft, Year Built, Sale Date, Days on Market, Property Type, Off-Market flag. A CSV and JSON file should also be saved to .tmp/. The neighborhood (Cleveland Heights, Grade A-) should be mentioned.

evals.prompt: what did duplexes sell for near 1156 Quilliams Rd, Richmond Heights OH 44143 in the last year? need comps for my deal analysis
evals.expected_output: A Markdown comps table showing recently sold properties (preferably multi-family/duplex) near 1156 Quilliams Rd, Richmond Heights OH 44143, with a 12-month lookback. Includes sale prices, beds, baths, sqft, price-per-sqft, and sale dates. Script is called with --lookback-days 365.

evals.prompt: I'm looking at a property on W 58th St in Cleveland, near 3279 W 58th St, Cleveland OH 44102. Pull me comps — similar SFRs sold in the last 90 days within 0.5 miles. Clark Fulton area.
evals.expected_output: Markdown comps table for properties near 3279 W 58th St, Cleveland OH 44102. 90-day lookback, 0.5-mile radius. Should note that Clark Fulton is a Grade B neighborhood. Output CSV and JSON saved to .tmp/.
